interview
• comatose - could not be aroused 0 = Behavior not present 
1 = Behavior continuously present, does not fluctuate 
2 = Behavior present, fluctuates (comes and goes, changes in severity) 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
475 LVL_CNSCSNS_DSCHRG_CD LVL_CNSCSNS_DSCHRG_CD Delirium: Altered level of consciousness (Dsch) CHAR 1 At the time of discharge, did the patient have altered level of consciousness as 
indicated by any of the following criteria:
• vigilant - startled easily to any sound
